base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of techs_combos — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1995 chrono trigger. Individual Techs per character + Dual Techs (2-char combos) + Triple Techs (3-char ultimate combos like Delta Force / Triple Raid). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Individual Techs per character + Dual Techs (2-char combos) + Triple Techs (3-char ultimate combos like Delta Force / Triple Raid)
